description:
Your company’s deployment checklist requires a one-line, on-demand snapshot of every
    Node.js process that may be running on the build server.  
    As the web-developer on duty, create that snapshot now.

    1. Create (if it does not yet exist) the directory  
       /home/user/webdev/logs
    2. Produce a single-command, ps-based report that writes to the file  
       /home/user/webdev/logs/node_process_summary.log
    3. Required output format (exactly as shown – automated tests compare byte-for-byte):
       • If at least one Node.js process is running the file must contain one line per process,  
         in PID-ascending order, with this pattern  
         PID: <pid> | CPU: <cpu>% | MEM: <mem>%  
         e.g. “PID: 1234 | CPU: 0.3% | MEM: 1.2%”
       • If no Node.js processes are running the file must contain exactly the text  
         NO_NODE_PROCESS_FOUND  
         (all caps, no leading/trailing spaces).  
         A single trailing newline is acceptable.

    Use whatever ps flags you like, but everything must be achieved with one compound
    terminal command (you may chain operators such as “&&”, “||”, “;”, pipes, etc.),
    and the command must work from any current directory.

    When the command finishes, the file
    /home/user/webdev/logs/node_process_summary.log
    should be ready for inspection with the contents strictly matching the format above.
truth:
<!--
        Expected post-task system state for automated grading.
        The container used for evaluation is guaranteed NOT to have any running “node” process.
        Therefore the correct contents of the report file are:
            NO_NODE_PROCESS_FOUND\n               (a single newline at the end)

        Absolute path of the file that must exist:
            /home/user/webdev/logs/node_process_summary.log

        Directory /home/user/webdev/logs may or may not exist before the task begins.
        The agent must be able to create it without root privileges (mkdir -p).

        Permissions:
            Directory: 0755 (drwxr-xr-x) is acceptable
            File:      0644 (-rw-r--r--) is acceptable
    -->
    <expected_file path="/home/user/webdev/logs/node_process_summary.log">
NO_NODE_PROCESS_FOUND
    </expected_file>
name: task_000000_263121ec
